query:
ALTER TABLE printerSettings 
ADD COLUMN fontSize INT DEFAULT 12 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN fontWeight INT DEFAULT 500 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN titleFontSize INT DEFAULT 16 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN titleFontWeight INT DEFAULT 700 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN itemFontSize INT DEFAULT 12 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN itemFontWeight INT DEFAULT 700 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN obsFontSize INT DEFAULT 11 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN obsFontWeight INT DEFAULT 500 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN showDividers BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL;
